name: Bamboo Bushido
short_description: When a mysterious force snatches his Grandpa into the depths of the Bamboo Forest, young Sam must master the ancient art of Bushido to bring him home. Battle a wacky cast of enemies and an even wackier cast of bamboo in this action packed 2D Adventure.
detailed_description:
Embark on a thrilling 2D adventure as Sam, a spirited young farmer. His peaceful life is shattered when a shadowy entity abducts his beloved Grandpa, whisking him away into the mystical Bamboo Forest. Now, Sam must embrace his destiny and become a true Master of Bushido to rescue his family and uncover the secrets lurking within the forest's depths.

Game Features:

  • Experience fast-paced 2D side-scrolling action with finely-tuned melee combat.

  • Battle a wacky cast of enemies, each with their own unique attack patterns and weaknesses.

  • Twenty-nine unique hand crafted levels for you to unlock and play, each designed with their own perils and challenges.

  • Earn "Bamboo Coins" by chopping bamboo. Spend your hard-earned currency in the shop to unlock a variety of cosmetic and functional upgrades including stylish new outfits with unique weapon skins.

  • Enjoy your adventure with 32 fully steam integrated and challenging achievements to unlock.

  • Survive the challenges presented in each unique level.

  • Use power-ups to boost your ability and protect yourself from hazards.

  • Explore a hand-drawn world brought to life with traditional 2D frame-by-frame animation.

  • Master the art of the katana and unleash your inner warrior, become the Master of Bushido.
